violations.text: Forks are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

Cutting board observed stored behind the faucet at the 3 bay sink. Cleaned & sanitized equipment must be stored in a clean dry location, where they are not subject to dust or splash, and at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The hand sink in the serving area is in poor repair, leaking when turned on. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The gasket on the sandwich prep unit was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Bakery items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment provided a binder of each product's ingredients for consumer display at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Milk was observed held at (43-46 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product Disposed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The 1 dr refrigerator in the front serving area is in poor repair(ambient temperature 50 degrees Fahrenheit. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
